description: Boot power-on sequence for M1 MacBook Air. Starts from USB-C cable insertion, ends at display LOGO. No MagSafe on this model.
WARNING: M1 board - sequence is similar to M2 but with SERA/SIMETRA PMU naming. No MagSafe path. Charger delay circuit uses D5340/D5345 (page 24).

sequence.name: USB-C Cable Insertion - 5V Default
sequence.action: USB-C cable inserted. Charger provides default 5V on VBUS.
sequence.what_happens: CD3217 internal MOSFET passes 5V to charger input path.
sequence.next_trigger: CD3217 detects 5V on VBUS -> begins CC communication

sequence.name: Charger Input Active
sequence.action: Charger input path enabled. Feeds U5200 charger IC.
sequence.what_happens: Charger IC begins regulating input -> generates PPBUS_AON from adapter or battery

sequence.name: PPBUS_AON Established
sequence.action: Main power bus comes up. If battery connected, PPBUS_AON ~ 12.6V.
sequence.prerequisite: BMU SYS_DETECT circuit (J5100 gasket) must enable VBAT output
sequence.next_trigger: PPBUS_AON present -> enables U5700 (SVR AON) via delayed PPVAON_PWR_EN

sequence.name: PP3V8_AON - SVR AON Powers Up
sequence.action: U5700 converts PPBUS_AON -> PP3V8_AON (3.8V, 30A max). Master rail for both PMUs.
sequence.enable: PPVAON_PWR_EN (delayed by D5340/D5345 circuit on page 24)
sequence.next_trigger: PP3V8_AON present -> SPMU (U7700) and MPMU (U8100) begin startup

sequence.name: SPMU (SIMETRA) & MPMU (SERA) Startup
sequence.action: Both PMUs receive PP3V8_AON and begin generating output rails in hardware-defined sequence.
sequence.next_trigger: All PMU rails stable -> enables standalone VRs

sequence.name: UC320 (5V) & XMC710 (3V3) Power Up
sequence.action: Standalone buck converters generate PP5V_S2 and PP3V3_S2 from PPBUS_AON.
sequence.next_trigger: PP5V_S2 + PP3V3_S2 present -> load switches enabled -> subsystems powered

sequence.name: SoC AWAKE Rails - DVFS Domains Power Up
sequence.action: SoC dynamic voltage domains enabled. PCPU, ECPU, GPU come up at initial DVFS voltage.
sequence.next_trigger: All SoC domains stable -> M1 OTP ready -> hard start complete

sequence.name: M1 Hard Start Complete - SoC Commands CD3217
sequence.action: M1 SoC has completed OTP verification and hard start. SoC sends command to CD3217.
sequence.what_happens: CD3217 reads ROM information from SPI ROM

sequence.name: PD Negotiation - 20V Boost
sequence.action: CD3217 uses CC line to communicate PD Source_Capabilities with charger. Requests 20V.
what_happens: CD3217 sends PD request via CC line

sequence.name: PPBUS_AON Stabilises at Full Power
sequence.action: With 20V on VBUS, charger now provides full power. PPBUS_AON stabilises at battery voltage.

sequence.name: Soft Start - SSD, BIOS, Display
sequence.action: M1 SoC communicates with SSD, reads BIOS/firmware, outputs display signals.
what_happens: SoC reads SSD via NAND interface (pages 62-63)
Display power sequencer (UP700/UP705/UP715) enables panel rails
